feature_requests.request: Add dark mode support to the app
example_quotes: still yet no dark mode
The only thing that could make it better is a dark mode. The app is bright white and it would great on the eyes if you added a dark mode option.
please please please add dark mode

feature_requests.request: Allow users to input their own numerical ratings instead of forced comparison ranking
example_quotes: I should be able to rank the restaurant with my own number. I don't agree with any of the rankings that are on my account
Just let me pick my own number rating and put it in my list
you cannot give your own score, or adjust the score given. Hoping this gets added as it's a simple feature

feature_requests.request: Add map view feature to see restaurants near you instead of just lists
example_quotes: Why don't they have a map view?
I wish there was a tab to just look at the map and see restaurants near you instead of a list.
I just want a map of restaurants near me and somehow that is not offered

feature_requests.request: Remove the requirement to invite friends to unlock features
example_quotes: Do not make me invite 4 friends to use the app.
this app would grow better if everyone was allowed to use all the features rather than blocking by invites
Allow me to dismiss the upper third of the Home Screen telling me to invite more people and put the features behind an in app purchase

feature_requests.request: Allow users to create custom lists and categories for organizing restaurants
example_quotes: Love this app so much but please make a custom lists feature!
wish I could create my own custom lists
custom labels would be SO MUCH MORE EASIER AND CONVENIENT

feature_requests.request: Allow categorization by different dining types instead of ranking all restaurants together
example_quotes: Or even by fast food, fast casual, fine dining, casual dining etc.
Would love the lists of restaurants to be separated to more categories because you can't really compare a pizza place to a fine dining spot
It needs better subcategories because some restaurants are hard to rank against each other, like ranking brunch against a steak house or a deli.

feature_requests.request: Allow ranking within specific cuisine categories rather than comparing all restaurants
example_quotes: You can't rank within each cuisine. How could I compare a bagel shop to a Greek restaurant?
it would be much more useful to rank WITHIN a certain label (for example, rank all your favorite Asian restaurants)
Scoring should only be based on restaurants in the same category/type of cuisine

feature_requests.request: Add landscape mode support for iPad
example_quotes: Would love to use this app in Landscape mode for iPad. Portrait mode is not ideal
My biggest gripe with the iPad app is that it does not support horizontal rotation
App is otherwise perfect besides no landscape orientation on the iPad!

feature_requests.request: Add separate category for breakfast/brunch restaurants
example_quotes: there needs to be a breakfast/brunch option so that it's a more accurate comparison
It would be great if bagel shops/breakfast places had their own category. It's so hard to rank a diner or a breakfast bagel to a full restaurant.
please consider making a category for brunch/breakfast food

feature_requests.request: Add ability to search by neighborhood instead of just city
example_quotes: Wish I could search by borough
Please let me search by neighborhoods in New York. I can only search by city, which is not helpful
it desperately needs a neighborhood search not just a major city

feature_requests.request: Allow separate ratings for atmosphere, service, and food quality
example_quotes: I also wish that you could rank on different axes (vibe vs food etc)
When deciding where to go people tend to think of atmosphere, service, and quality of food and drink as the three primary components... Beli does not allow for ratings of these elements
I need a different ranking section. Going to have breakfast somewhere is totally different to lunch.

feature_requests.request: Fix back button navigation to go to previous screen instead of home
example_quotes: Why does the back button take you basically back home? It's very frustrating and makes navigation much harder.
or back gesture. PLEASE!
gets annoying to use sometimes without a back arrow

feature_requests.request: Add ability to rank the same restaurant in multiple categories
example_quotes: Please add a feature to rank the same place in different categories. Some places are both coffee shops during the day and bars at night for example.
Also a way to rank a place as a bar AND restaurant together.
please add the ability to rank a location separately as a bar and a restaurant! There are so many places that I love their drinks but hate their food

feature_requests.request: Make it easier to submit new restaurants to the database
example_quotes: way too hard to submit restaurants
I went to China for a week and 0% of the places I went to were on here... why can't I review them?
ability to pin point new locations (not everything is on the map obviously)

feature_requests.request: Add messaging and communication features between friends
example_quotes: messaging friends/sending places via the app
photo commenting on for friends only
I wish when I add someone to a ranking that I dined with they would get a push notification to rank as well

feature_requests.request: Remove or improve the comparison-based rating system
example_quotes: Absolutely hate the rating system... I tap 'too tough' every time because I simply don't care about comparing
Not a fan of having to decide which restaurant I like better. I always opt for 'too tough' but would prefer this didn't exist
wish I had more say in the rankings and that it wasn't automatic

feature_requests.request: Add ability to filter and sort restaurant lists by various criteria
example_quotes: there is NO way to sort by when you visited a place or filter by date
Would be nice if you could filter your own rankings by city though
saving my filters would be nice since I am rarely looking to spend $$$$

feature_requests.request: Fix notification settings and reduce unwanted notifications
example_quotes: I like the app but I get notifications even though they are all turned off besides reservations.
STOP with the streak and summary and whatever notifications... And there is NO way to opt out of these!
Every Single Action Trigger A Banner

feature_requests.request: Add more restaurant categories beyond just restaurants and cafes
example_quotes: Need more categories: fast food, pizza/sub/sandwich shops for food places that aren't restaurants
they need to add more categories as to what kind of food ie: breakfast lunch and dinner instead of just restaurant and cafes
I do believe that more categories should be added...I'm specifically talking about a winery/brewery category

feature_requests.request: Show user photos and notes in restaurant list views
example_quotes: can we PLEASE have the option to see our pictures/blurbs of our notes when looking at our 'been' lists???
Ability to toggle on/off to show personal notes in the overall list view
It would be super helpful to be able to see my notes and photos from it

feature_requests.request: Allow sharing lists outside of the platform without requiring Beli app
example_quotes: the seeming inability to share my lists outside of the platform
I wish it had export features. You can't send your list to friends unless they have the Beli app installed too
Add features around sharing

feature_requests.request: Add global ratings to see how all users rate restaurants
example_quotes: The ability to see a 'global' average ranking for every single restaurant based on users in the app alongside your friends ranking and your own ranking
would love if the app showed me "Beli's Score" based on its entire userbase rather than telling me what it "thinks" my score is
deeply annoyed by the fact that there aren't restaurant ratings (as google does)

feature_requests.request: Improve search functionality for finding restaurants by cuisine and specific items
example_quotes: the search functionality really badly needs to be updated. When you go to search it has prompts for cuisine and even occasion, but searching for 'cafe' or 'steakhouse' only ever returns super specific and even extremely distant results
Hard to search up specific things or when you try to search up best burritos or best food in specific city it doesn't come up
I think it could really be next level if we could search with those filters or save according to those filters

feature_requests.request: Add ability to see visit dates and when restaurants were reviewed
example_quotes: it would be great to see the date of my friends' ranking or visit date under each restaurant listing
I wish the app would show the date you reviewed each place
Be able to add date(s) that the spot was visited

feature_requests.request: Fix technical issues with app performance and visual lag
example_quotes: once you have more than about 200 restaurants ranked, it's extremely inconvenient to reorder the list because of how intense the visual lag is
I'll be trying to add captions to photos and the whole app just freezes
The filter in Your Lists tab never works. Please fix it

pain_opportunities.pain: Users are forced to invite 4 friends before accessing core app features
pain_opportunities.opportunity: Allow users to experience core functionality immediately with optional friend invites for enhanced features
example_quotes: Do not make me invite 4 friends to use the app.
You can't even use the basic features of this app without inviting people
pain_opportunities.suggested_approach: Create a freemium model where core features are immediately accessible, with social features as optional enhancements.

pain_opportunities.pain: App performance is extremely slow with frequent freezing and crashes
pain_opportunities.opportunity: Optimize app performance to eliminate freezing, reduce loading times, and ensure stable operation
example_quotes: Takes me over 1 min to add each restaurant since the app loads so slowly.
App is constantly freezing and slow
pain_opportunities.suggested_approach: Conduct comprehensive performance audit and optimize critical user flows to achieve sub-2-second loading times.

pain_opportunities.pain: Search and recommendation features are broken or completely non-functional
pain_opportunities.opportunity: Build a robust search and recommendation engine that reliably surfaces relevant restaurants
example_quotes: Recs don't work. Which is the whole point of the app
i can no longer use the search function (which obviously makes the app worthless)
pain_opportunities.suggested_approach: Rebuild core search infrastructure with proper indexing, filtering, and fallback mechanisms to ensure 99%+ reliability.

pain_opportunities.pain: Map functionality is broken showing blank screens or failing to load
pain_opportunities.opportunity: Create a reliable, fast-loading map interface that accurately displays restaurant locations
example_quotes: unable to use map view. literally just loads for 5 seconds and then shows blank white screen
Recommendation maps are unusable. It's often blank
pain_opportunities.suggested_approach: Implement robust map rendering with offline fallbacks and proper error handling for network issues.

pain_opportunities.pain: Rating calculation system has persistent bugs causing incorrect scores
pain_opportunities.opportunity: Fix rating calculation engine to ensure accurate and reliable scoring throughout the app
example_quotes: Unfortunately there has been a bug for a month now that makes the ratings miscalculate
The app shifted all my ratings around because it didn't like that I had so few 9.0+ ratings
pain_opportunities.suggested_approach: Audit and rewrite rating calculation logic with comprehensive testing to prevent data corruption.

pain_opportunities.pain: Phone number required upfront with no alternative social login options
pain_opportunities.opportunity: Implement Apple Sign-In and other social login options as alternatives to phone number registration
example_quotes: At least let me sign up with Apple before I 'commit' to giving my phone number!
Phone number required for signup? must invite friends? I don't sign up for random apps
pain_opportunities.suggested_approach: Add social login options (Apple, Google) and make phone number optional for initial app exploration.

pain_opportunities.pain: Cannot access basic discovery features without completing reviews or inviting friends
pain_opportunities.opportunity: Provide immediate access to restaurant discovery and browsing without requiring prior engagement
example_quotes: trying to just look around and browse for places in a city is impossible. you have to unlock features by doing reviews
It's pointless that we can't access recommendations or do specific searches cause we haven't reviewed enough places
pain_opportunities.suggested_approach: Make core discovery features immediately available while incentivizing contributions through other means.

pain_opportunities.pain: UI is confusing, cluttered, and difficult to navigate
pain_opportunities.opportunity: Redesign user interface with cleaner navigation patterns and more intuitive user flows
example_quotes: Ui is hard to figure out, not easy to use.
Something about the font, the colors, the spacing or something else bothers my eyes, there are so many buttons and prompts
pain_opportunities.suggested_approach: Conduct UX research and redesign with focus on simplicity, visual hierarchy, and user-centered design principles.

pain_opportunities.pain: Food preferences are ignored in recommendations algorithm
pain_opportunities.opportunity: Implement proper preference filtering to exclude unwanted cuisine types from recommendations
example_quotes: I get Thai food recommendations all the time and I put my preferences as no Thai food.
I plugged all the restaurants into the app I've eaten in NYC (not one of them sushi) and 90% of the recommended restaurants are SUSHI RESTAURANTS
pain_opportunities.suggested_approach: Rebuild recommendation engine to strictly respect user dietary preferences and cuisine exclusions.

pain_opportunities.pain: Notifications continue despite being disabled in settings
pain_opportunities.opportunity: Fix notification settings to properly respect user preferences and disable unwanted notifications
example_quotes: I have all notifications turned off but they still insist on sending me notifications.
Deselect 'streak reminders' and you STILL get streak reminders
pain_opportunities.suggested_approach: Implement granular notification controls with proper backend validation to ensure settings are respected.

pain_opportunities.pain: Restaurant database has poor coverage outside major cities
pain_opportunities.opportunity: Expand restaurant database coverage to include establishments in smaller cities and international markets
example_quotes: I live in a small city so there's probably only like 50-80 restaurants but this app only shows 7 locations
only works for about a dozen cities
pain_opportunities.suggested_approach: Integrate with multiple restaurant data sources and enable user-contributed additions to expand coverage organically.

pain_opportunities.pain: Cannot search restaurants by city for travel planning
pain_opportunities.opportunity: Add city/location search functionality so users can discover restaurants before traveling
example_quotes: I'm heading to SD and wanted some food recommendations... Why can't you simply search a city and get ratings?
Please let me search by neighborhoods in New York
pain_opportunities.suggested_approach: Build location-based search with city, neighborhood, and address-level granularity for travel use cases.

pain_opportunities.pain: Invite system is buggy - accepted invites don't unlock features
pain_opportunities.opportunity: Fix invite tracking system to properly credit users when their invitations are successful
example_quotes: I have invited friends, and they used my download link, but after clicking 'Unlock' for the features I still don't have it
tried referring again with text and link and both give errors when they click on the link
pain_opportunities.suggested_approach: Rebuild invitation tracking with proper validation and real-time status updates for users.

pain_opportunities.pain: Rating system forces comparison between incomparable restaurant types
pain_opportunities.opportunity: Create category-based ranking systems so users can compare restaurants within similar types
example_quotes: I don't like how it makes you compare restaurants that have nothing in common. Why would I compare a Mexican restaurant to a barbecue joint?
Comparing a pizza restaurant to a steak restaurant makes no sense
pain_opportunities.suggested_approach: Implement restaurant categorization with optional within-category comparisons alongside overall rankings.

pain_opportunities.pain: Cannot manually set custom numerical ratings for restaurants
pain_opportunities.opportunity: Allow users to assign custom numerical scores alongside or instead of comparative rankings
example_quotes: I love beli but I hate that the rankings are based on comparison to other places!!! I should be able to rank the restaurant with my own number.
An app for reviews that does not let me make my own rating is wild to me
pain_opportunities.suggested_approach: Add optional numerical rating input alongside comparative rankings to give users more control.

pain_opportunities.pain: Cannot add restaurants that aren't already in the database
pain_opportunities.opportunity: Enable user-generated restaurant additions with moderation to expand coverage organically
example_quotes: I went to China for a week and 0% of the places I went to were on here. It's fine if no one else using Beli reviews these places but why can't I review them?
Is there a way we can add restaurants to the list? I've looked, but couldn't find a way to do it
pain_opportunities.suggested_approach: Build user submission flow with photo verification and community moderation for new restaurant additions.

pain_opportunities.pain: App lacks comprehensive map view for restaurant discovery
pain_opportunities.opportunity: Implement a discovery map view that shows all restaurants with ratings in any geographic area
example_quotes: Why don't they have a map view?
I just want a map of restaurants near me and somehow that is not offered
pain_opportunities.suggested_approach: Create a comprehensive map discovery feature showing all restaurants in an area with filtering options.

pain_opportunities.pain: Rating flow requires too many clicks and screens making it inefficient
pain_opportunities.opportunity: Streamline the rating process to a single screen with quick rating options
example_quotes: Why is it so many clicks/screens to rate a place
why is there an annoying screen prompting me to share after EVERY SINGLE RATING?
pain_opportunities.suggested_approach: Redesign rating flow as a single-screen experience with optional detailed input for power users.

pain_opportunities.pain: Multi-dimensional rating system missing for atmosphere, service, and food quality
pain_opportunities.opportunity: Implement rating system allowing users to rate different aspects of restaurant experience separately
example_quotes: people tend to think of atmosphere, service, and quality of food and drink as the three primary components when making a decision. Beli does not allow for ratings of these elements
pain_opportunities.suggested_approach: Add optional detailed rating breakdown for food, service, and atmosphere alongside overall score.

pain_opportunities.pain: App lacks dark mode support causing eye strain
pain_opportunities.opportunity: Implement dark mode theme option to improve user experience and reduce eye strain
example_quotes: Every update is allegedly a UX update but still yet no dark mode
Also, a darker mode would be most useful. The bright white is strenuous on the eyes
pain_opportunities.suggested_approach: Add system-responsive dark mode toggle in settings with proper contrast ratios for accessibility.

mentions.verbatim: The idea is great creating a more modern/social aspect to yelp.
You can do everything this app does on Google maps.
This app works great and I love that it imported my lists from Google Maps
it looks like these developers have turned Google Reviews into a strava type of app. Totally unnecessary since Google is already a reliable social platform connected to your email.
you'll realize why this app doesn't have Letterboxd level clout
The only streak I care about less than yours is the one with the manipulative language owl
This beats Yelp in terms of ratings. There's something clarifying in having to choose how good a restaurant is compared to another one that you've visited.

I cannot tolerate Yelp any longer and Beli appeared to be another option….but multiple days in and attempting to check off all of their tasks in order to even gain access to reviews or user notes is quite daunting.
Downloaded after NYT article said it was a Yelp killer. Sadly, it definitely isn't…
More functional than yelp, google reviews, anything else.
More functional than yelp, google reviews, anything else.

I'm gonna start this off by saying this is probably one of my favorite new social media's out of the new ones like BeReal, Lapse, ect. It's a great app, I see it topping yelp for relevance in the food/restaurant industry.

I'm gonna start this off by saying this is probably one of my favorite new social media's out of the new ones like BeReal, Lapse, ect. It's a great app, I see it topping yelp for relevance in the food/restaurant industry.
I see it topping yelp for relevance in the food/restaurant industry.
I recently started using Google Maps but this is the upgrade to that. I'm obsessed and looking forward to how this app develops.

Why should I create an account, give you my phone number and email, enable background app refresh, live updates, more frequent live updates, etc. just to see reviews of restaurants? You're out of your mind giving this company so much access and time investment just to see what every map app does already.
They have some sort of mid year and annual Spotify wrapped-esque food recap which I love

My friend shared this app with me when I expressed to her that I enjoy reviewing on Yelp but this weirdo app is not that. I don't understand the point. More of a food social network ? That only works if you have friends ? I truly am perplexed. Anyway didn't want to figure it out or force people on to an app. I'll continue to enjoy Yelp.
when looking at restaurant details, a picture of the restaurant itself (not just the food) would be greatly appreciated (maybe scraped from google maps)
mentions.feature_gap: Restaurant photos scraped from Google Maps for verification

mentions.verbatim: I understand that you wanna have a social network, but you also have to add some value in this place is no better than Google.

I have had an excel database for a while now to track my restaurant experiences, but it was always so cumbersome to add new restaurants and share it with others. But Beli makes all that so simple!

This is exactly what I have been searching for to convert my Apple Note into something more searchable!
I previously used Google Maps to keep track of restaurants, but Beli makes it so much easier to catalogue where I've been and the ranking is much more helpful than I realized.

I don't want to use Apple map

mentions.verbatim: My only regret is I wish it was in existence sooner so I don't have to go through all my yelp check ins and bookmarks to transfer my thoughts!
I used to track restaurants in google maps but Beli easily blows that out of the water.
This is the goodreads for resteraunts & i LOVE IT
If google maps, yelp and instagram had a baby. Highly recommend!
This app is a huge upgrade from my Notes app as a way to keep track of restaurants I would like to try someday, and remember what I liked about the ones I have been to.

loved the recs from their IG account, and didn't know they were going to launch an app too. was excited to try it out. So far love it and the ranking concept - hard to decipher what "4 stars" on traditional review systems really means to ME.
Finally - I don't need to keep lists on Notes to figure out where I want to try for dinner!
I rarely look at restaurant reviews on Yelp anymore because they are so meaningless to me. Beli lets me rank my preferences against my preferences so I can create ranks that actually mean something!
My boyfriend and I love trying new places and I used to keep a list in my notes but Beli has made it so much easier
After giving up on Yelp and using exclusively Google maps to find new restaurants, Beli has changed how I go about finding recommendations
After giving up on Yelp and using exclusively Google maps to find new restaurants, Beli has changed how I go about finding recommendations
finally there's an alternative to the myriad 0-5 star systems out there and I've already found most of my favorite recent discoveries via Beli

summary.name: Yelp
summary.user_perception: Users see Yelp as the established incumbent with unreliable reviews and poor bookmarking capabilities, though some appreciate its search filters and comprehensive data.
beli_advantages: More reliable and personalized reviews
Better ranking system that compares restaurants against each other
Superior bookmarking and tracking capabilities
Social aspect makes reviewing more engaging
Note-taking functionality for restaurants
beli_gaps: Search by cuisine, price range, and other filters
Location-based photo suggestions when attaching photos
Integration with existing Yelp reviews and ratings
key_quotes: This beats Yelp in terms of ratings. There's something clarifying in having to choose how good a restaurant is compared to another one that you've visited.
I rarely look at restaurant reviews on Yelp anymore because they are so meaningless to me. Beli lets me rank my preferences against my preferences so I can create ranks that actually mean something!

summary.name: Google Maps
summary.user_perception: Users view Google Maps as functional but limited for restaurant organization and discovery, though they appreciate its comprehensive data and user-friendly interface.
beli_advantages: Better restaurant organization and categorization
Color-coded map visualization for restaurant quality
Superior tracking and list management
More reliable reviews than Google Maps
Imported user's existing Google Maps data seamlessly
beli_gaps: Restaurant photos scraped from Google Maps for verification
Better user interface and ability to see all categories at once on map
Visual map search feature like Apple Maps
Integration with Google Maps for directions instead of Apple Maps
Seeing all restaurants which have been rated on a map
key_quotes: I recently started using Google Maps but this is the upgrade to that. I'm obsessed and looking forward to how this app develops.
Color coding a map easily to figure out which restaurants/bars are good/mid/bad is so much easier to navigate than Google or Apple Maps.

summary.name: Notes App
summary.user_perception: Users see basic notes apps as outdated and cumbersome tools they were forced to use before finding Beli for restaurant tracking.
beli_advantages: Searchable and organized restaurant database
Social sharing capabilities
Visual interface with photos and ratings
Eliminates need for manual list maintenance
key_quotes: I had been dying to find a way to keep track of my food experiences and had resorted to a list in my notes app, which was really bare bones. This app is exactly what I was looking for.
Finally a reason to delete the hundreds of notes full of restaurants in my phone!

summary.name: Google Reviews
summary.user_perception: Users see Google Reviews as an established platform but prefer Beli's more personalized and social approach to restaurant reviews.
beli_advantages: More functional and reliable reviews
Social media-style interface makes reviewing more engaging
beli_gaps: Integration with existing Google Reviews and ratings
key_quotes: More functional than yelp, google reviews, anything else.
it looks like these developers have turned Google Reviews into a strava type of app.

summary.name: Instagram
summary.user_perception: Users appreciate Instagram's social media feel and visual approach, which they see reflected positively in Beli's design.
beli_advantages: Purpose-built for restaurant reviews rather than general social media
More fun and engaging than general social platforms
key_quotes: While I've never been one to review establishments, the social media/insta feel of reviewing make me more inclined to partake.
I recently have more fun on Beli than Pinterest or Instagram!!

summary.name: Foursquare
summary.user_perception: Users remember Foursquare as a useful restaurant tracking app that has shut down, leaving them seeking alternatives like Beli.
beli_advantages: Note-taking functionality that Foursquare lacked
Modern interface and social features
beli_gaps: Simple map with ratings for discovery
key_quotes: Looking for a better alternative to Google Maps and Yelp now that Foursquare is shutting down.
Before then, the only options to track restaurants were Yelp and Foursquare, which don't have the 'note' function that Beli does.

summary.name: Letterboxd
summary.user_perception: Users see Letterboxd as the gold standard for entertainment tracking and wish Beli could achieve similar success and simplicity for restaurants.
beli_advantages: Ranking system is more meaningful than traditional star ratings
beli_gaps: Restaurant rating system without forced friend invitations
Simpler interface for marking restaurants as 'want to try'
key_quotes: you'll realize why this app doesn't have Letterboxd level clout
I just wanted something like letterboxd for restaurants, but forcing me to invite friends to the app to make it remotely functional just means I'm passing the curse on to the next person

summary.name: Goodreads
summary.user_perception: Users see Goodreads as an ideal model for tracking and rating content, wanting Beli to be the restaurant equivalent.
beli_advantages: Successfully applies the Goodreads model to restaurants
beli_gaps: Simpler interface for marking restaurants as 'want to try'
key_quotes: This is the goodreads for resteraunts & i LOVE IT
I just joined and was hoping that it would be more like Goodreads.
